title: SDS-PAGE and Western Blot Analysis
author: Elisabeth Holzer
materials: SuperSignal West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate
Incubate with HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies diluted 1:10,000 in blocking buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Include PageRuler Prestained protein marker (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 26620 or 26617) for size reference.
Analyze the images using ImageJ (RRID:SCR_003070; https://imagej.net/).

steps.title: Load samples onto 4–12% SDS-PAGE gels...
steps.instruction: Load samples onto 4–12% SDS-PAGE gels (Invitrogen, Cat# NP0321BOX or NP0323BOX).

steps.title: Run the gel according to standard electrophoresis protocols
steps.instruction: Run the gel according to standard electrophoresis protocols.

steps.title: Transfer proteins onto nitrocellulose membranes (GE...
steps.instruction: Transfer proteins onto nitrocellulose membranes (GE Healthcare, Cat# RPN132D) for 01:30:00 using the Mini Trans-Blot Cell (Bio-Rad, Cat# 20-45-111).

steps.title: Block membranes for 01:00:00 at Room...
steps.instruction: Block membranes for 01:00:00 at Room temperature with 5% milk powder in TBS-T.

steps.title: Incubate membranes Overnight at 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate membranes Overnight at 4 °C with primary antibodies diluted in blocking buffer.

steps.title: Wash membranes three times for 00:05:00 each with TBS-T
steps.instruction: Wash membranes three times for 00:05:00 each with TBS-T.

steps.title: Wash membranes three times with TBS-T
steps.instruction: Wash membranes three times with TBS-T.

steps.title: Incubate membranes with SuperSignal West Femto...
steps.instruction: Incubate membranes with SuperSignal West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 34096).

steps.title: Image blots using ChemiDoc MP Imaging System (Bio-Rad)
steps.instruction: Image blots using ChemiDoc MP Imaging System (Bio-Rad).
